faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: To reset your password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link within a few minutes.

faqs.question: How do I contact support?
faqs.answer: You can contact our support team by emailing support@company.com or calling 1-800-SUPPORT Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST.

faqs.question: What are your business hours?
faqs.answer: Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST. For urgent issues outside business hours, please email emergency@company.com.

faqs.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqs.answer: To cancel your subscription, go to Account Settings > Subscription > Cancel Plan. Your access will remain active until the end of your billing period.

faqs.question: How do I update my billing information?
faqs.answer: Go to Account Settings > Billing > Update Payment Method. We accept all major credit cards and PayPal.

faqs.question: My account is locked, what do I do?
faqs.answer: Accounts are locked after 5 failed login attempts. Wait 30 minutes for it to unlock automatically, or contact support to unlock it immediately.

faqs.question: How do I download my invoice?
faqs.answer: Log in to your account, go to Account Settings > Billing > Invoice History, and click Download next to the invoice you need.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use industry-standard AES-256 encryption for all stored data and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. We are SOC 2 Type II certified.

faqs.question: How do I upgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Go to Account Settings > Subscription > Upgrade Plan. Changes take effect immediately and you'll be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of the billing period.

faqs.question: I'm not receiving emails from your service, what should I do?
faqs.answer: Check your spam or junk folder first. If emails aren't there, make sure support@company.com is in your contacts. If the issue persists, contact support.
